summary: Full-stack testing of NetGuard Change-Risk Gate v2. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with dark theme. 6-node agent pipeline working end-to-end. RAG collections seeded with 15 CVEs, 15 ATT&CK, 10 policy controls, 5 change history entries.

issues: Console hydration warning: <span> as child of <tbody> (wrapping <tr> in span). Not a visible bug but technically invalid HTML - React renders fine despite the warning.

action_items: Minor: Fix hydration warning in Dashboard.jsx and AssessmentDetail.jsx - map() inside <tbody> is being wrapped in a <span> by React dev tools overlay (likely a dev environment issue only, not a real bug)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 384 lines - manageable but approaching limit
graph.py is 431 lines - consider splitting narrative generators to separate module
MongoDB duplicate key: if same assessment_id created twice, insert_one will fail - no upsert protection

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load, all flows working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (15 CVEs, 15 ATT&CK, 10 policy controls). Created 3 test assessments during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working: /api/v1/assess, /api/v1/assessments, /api/v1/health/rag, /api/v1/stats, /api/v1/audit. Frontend pages: Dashboard, New Assessment (submits assessment + redirects to detail), AssessmentDetail (shows risk gauge, rule findings, CVE, ATT&CK, pipeline trace), Knowledge Base (4 ChromaDB collections with counts > 0), Audit Log (search + filter working). LLM/GitHub/ServiceNow/Jira integrations are MOCKED placeholders as expected.
mocked_integrations: Claude 3.5 Sonnet analysis (placeholder returns mock based on rule findings)
